name: Vardhman Acrylics Limited
summary: Vardhman Acrylics Limited manufactures and supplies acrylic fiber and tow in India. The company markets its products under the VARLAN brand name. Vardhman Acrylics Limited was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Ludhiana, India. Vardhman Acrylics Limited is a subsidiary of Vardhman Textiles Limited.
